name: atomic-op
summary: Uninterruptible operation. CAS (Compare-And-Swap), fetch-add. Lock-free programming.

facts.text: compare_exchange(expected, new): atomic if *ptr == expected: *ptr = new
fetch_add(n): atomic += n, trả old value

danger: ABA problem: CAS không detect A→B→A
memory ordering: acquire/release semantics cần thiết
